case_title: TOM DUFFY JR et al VS. ERIC BLUM

docket_entries.description: RETURNED MAIL SENT TO ERIC BLUM OF SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER - RETURN TO SENDER- INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS -UNABLE TO FORWARD

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: SAMUEL C. LAW. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-31-2012 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO NOV-28-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUENNA HO. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURN MAIL - SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER ; UNABLE TO FORWARD - SENT TO PLAINTIFF

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY DUFFY JR, TOM DUFFY, MYSTIC ( SERVICE ANIMAL ) AS TO DEFENDANT BLUM, ERIC (SERVICE ANIMAL ) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-28-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO DEC-20-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PLAINTIFFS, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-20-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-30-2013 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON OCTOBER 16, 2012 IS INVALID. THERE IS NO NAME OR DESCRIPTION OF PERSON SUB-SERVED. ALSO NO METHOD OF MAILING INDICATED ON PROOF OF SERVICE. *PLAINTIFF ADVISED THAT COURET MAIL SENT TO HIM WAS RETURNED BY THE POST OFFICE. PLAINTIFF SAYS ADDRESS ON FILE IS HIS CORRECT ADDRESS.* APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURNED MAIL: ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAILED 1/31/13 TO DEFENDANT ERIC BLUM, "INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
